title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Everest Roofing Limited
body: "Application number 5447  Applicant Ashi Group Limited objected to the name used by Everest Roofing Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 21 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Everest Roofing Limited is changed to 15243495 Ltd. "
